calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Defendant The Regents Of The University Of California
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal of entire action filed on April 20, 2017. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel joinder of Jamie Burns as a party is GRANTED. Granting of the motion is mandated by CCP 337.60 and applicable case law. Plaintiff's position that he be required to name Ms. Burns as a defendant only if the Regents do not assert a statute of limitations defense to any claim by Ms. Burns lacks merit. This is not the proper motion to adjudicate that issue. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, email: lmartinez@sftc.org. (D302)

Off Calendar May-12-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
